configuration.scalaLite.mode.description: Default Scala Lite mode (A/B/C) when opening the workspace.
configuration.scalaLite.logLevel.descrip: Log verbosity for Scala Lite internal structured logs.
configuration.scalaLite.diagnostics.enab: Enable or disable syntax diagnostics collection.
configuration.scalaLite.diagnostics.trig: When diagnostics should run: on save or on type.
configuration.scalaLite.formatter.format: Run formatter automatically when saving Scala files.
configuration.scalaLite.activeProfile.de: Active Scala Lite task profile name for this workspace.
configuration.scalaLite.goToDefinition.s: Cache chooser selections in-memory to auto-jump repeated go-to-definition requests in the same context.
Bypass sticky go-to-definition cache and always run full staged resolution.
configuration.scalaLite.hover.previewLin: Number of definition body preview lines to show in high-confidence hover cards (0-5).
configuration.scalaLite.deps.enabled.des: Enable classpath-aware dependency indexing and navigation.
configuration.scalaLite.deps.includeInWo: Include dependency symbols in Workspace Symbols search.
configuration.scalaLite.deps.indexTestSc: Include test-scope dependencies when syncing classpath.
configuration.scalaLite.deps.indexCaps.m: Maximum number of dependency JARs to index during classpath sync.
Maximum time allowed for dependency indexing before aborting.
configuration.scalaLite.deps.cache.enabl: Persist dependency indexes under .scala-lite for faster reuse.
JDK modules to index for standard-library navigation.
configuration.scalaLite.build.classpathP: Classpath provider selection strategy: auto, Maven, or SBT.
configuration.scalaLite.build.jdkHome.de: Explicit JDK home override used for JDK indexing.
configuration.scalaLite.build.maven.prof: Maven profiles to activate when resolving classpath.
configuration.scalaLite.build.maven.args: Extra Maven arguments for classpath/sources commands.
configuration.scalaLite.build.maven.wrap: Override path to the Maven wrapper executable.
configuration.scalaLite.build.sbt.args.d: Extra SBT arguments for classpath/sources commands.
configuration.scalaLite.build.sbt.strate: SBT resolution strategy: sbt-show (accurate), coursier (fast), or auto.
